title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Ustraa

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Ustraa
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Ustraa! We are hiring a Category Manager for our Howrah team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Ustraa:
Ustraa is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ustraa!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
